debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
f : C(↑(spectrum ℂ a), ℂ)
x✝ y✝ : H
w✝ : ℕ → Set ↑(spectrum ℂ a)
⊢ (∀ (i : ℕ), MeasurableSet (w✝ i)) →
    Pairwise (Function.onFun Disjoint w✝) →
      HasSum
        (fun i =>
          inner ℂ x✝
            ((continuousLinearMapOfBilin (@toBoundedBilin H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha 1 ((w✝ i).indicator 1))) y✝))
        (inner ℂ x✝
          ((continuousLinearMapOfBilin (@toBoundedBilin H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha 1 ((⋃ i, w✝ i).indicator 1))) y✝))

failed_attempts:
fun x y w hw hdisj => by
    simp only [InnerProductSpace.continuousLinearMapOfBilin_apply, toBoundedBilin]
    convert (cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).m_iUnion hw hdisj using 1
    · ext i
      rw [ComplexMeasure.integral_indicator (hw i)]
    · rw [ComplexMeasure.integral_indicator (MeasurableSet.iUnion hw)]
